prompt_text:
### Demographics: 66-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 18 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after preoperative labs showed elevated HbA1c
Current symptoms: No DKA/HHS symptoms; no recent hypoglycemia episodes; no acute complaints

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 4 (15-29)
Heart failure: HFpEF (NYHA Class III)
ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of CABG); Coronary artery disease (History of PCI/stent)
Body mass index category: Normal
Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
Major Depressive Disorder
Urolithiasis (status post lithotripsy)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 4 (15-29); HF: HFpEF (NYHA Class III); ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of CABG); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Former smoker (quit 10 years ago; 20 cigarettes/day for 20 years; ~20 pack-years); Alcohol 5-6 drinks/week (1-2 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Dulaglutide 1.5mg once weekly; Sertraline (50 mg daily), Fluticasone/salmeterol Inhaler (twice daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily), Ciprofloxacin (500 mg twice daily for 7 days)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 68.4 kg; Height 178.8 cm; BMI 21.4 kg/m²; Blood pressure 116/71 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 8.4%; 9 months ago 8.0%; 6 months ago 7.9%; 3 months ago 7.7%; current 8.0%), FPG (12 months ago 175mg/dL; 9 months ago 181mg/dL; 6 months ago 162mg/dL; 3 months ago 190mg/dL; current 165mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 66.1kg; 9 months ago 70.1kg; 6 months ago 67.8kg; 3 months ago 63.9kg; current 68.4kg), Height (12 months ago 178.8cm; 9 months ago 178.8cm; 6 months ago 178.8cm; 3 months ago 178.8cm; current 178.8cm), BMI (12 months ago 21.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 22.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 21.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 20.0kg/m²; current 21.4kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 120mmHg; 9 months ago 120mmHg; 6 months ago 120mmHg; 3 months ago 120mmHg; current 116mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 69mmHg; 9 months ago 70mmHg; 6 months ago 70mmHg; 3 months ago 71mmHg; current 71mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 35U/L; 9 months ago 33U/L; 6 months ago 33U/L; 3 months ago 30U/L; current 32U/L), AST (12 months ago 8U/L; 9 months ago 5U/L; 6 months ago 4.2U/L; 3 months ago 13U/L; current 10U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.9mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.9mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.9mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.9mg/dL; current 0.9mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 31mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 30mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 26mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 25mL/min/1.73m²; current 25mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 463mg/g; 9 months ago 526mg/g; 6 months ago 563mg/g; 3 months ago 588mg/g; current 815mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 87mg/dL; 9 months ago 83mg/dL; 6 months ago 82mg/dL; 3 months ago 84mg/dL; current 85mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 48mg/dL; 9 months ago 52mg/dL; 6 months ago 48mg/dL; 3 months ago 48mg/dL; current 50mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 123mg/dL; 9 months ago 105mg/dL; 6 months ago 109mg/dL; 3 months ago 122mg/dL; current 115mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 12.0g/dL; 9 months ago 11.2g/dL; 6 months ago 10.4g/dL; 3 months ago 11.0g/dL; current 10.3g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Negative (Current); fasting C-peptide 1.82 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
